role: Self-generated joy and control over happiness
treePosition: As presented in the workbook, following Heru — see Sekher's provenance note on how this ordering was inferred.
teachingNotes: Self generated Joy to empower creative visualization of success and healing.
Power to manipulate our Life Force (Qi, Ra), which is the motive power behind the ability to attract resources and repel obstructions.
Faculty of Imagination to direct our Will to the achievement of our goals.
Power to overcome a lack of joy for life.
A major component of Happiness — the ability to Enjoy the Peace that is our Divine Nature.

hekau.text: I am a divine spiritual being fully endowed with control over my happiness and thus my destiny. I enjoy the spiritually acquired goods in life and enjoy the peace when I have no things, yet enjoying the peace. There's no end to my joy.
Since it has been medically proven for thousands of years that smiling, and laughing are major proponents of Wellness, they are the governors of my body's response to challenges.
What would happen in my life if I remained joyful, which is under my will, for the next 365 days.
I am always joyful. Nothing can add to it. Nothing can detract from it.
I take neither gain nor loss to heart. Enjoyment of Peace is my nature.
Why ride the emotional roller coaster to success when Happiness can take you there.
Thank you God for giving me full control over my happiness. I will not hold it ransom to achievements in the world.

I use my imagination to rise above the animal within, to destroy the fiction of the human within. My joy is the enjoyment of Peace in the midst of the greatest challenges. I am the master of my emotions through the power of my imagination.
